name: Herbag handbag
description: Hermes Herbag Zip 31 in a sophisticated Etoupe canvas with Fauve Vache Hunter leather trim. This versatile handbag features the iconic Kelly-style closure, a convenient exterior rear zipper pocket, and a matching removable interior pouch. The design includes a single top handle and a long shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. Polished palladium-plated hardware adds a refined touch to the durable Officier canvas body. This classic piece combines the elegance of the Kelly silhouette with the practicality of a casual tote, making it an essential addition to any luxury collection.
